title: Receptionist (6 Months Contract)
description:
• Provides meaningful exposure to various aspects of office management.
  • Great exposure within a well-known Asset Management firm.

About Our Client

The company operates in the Financial Services sector and is recognised for its professional approach and commitment to excellence. It is a well-established organisation with a strong presence in the industry.

Job Description

  • Greet and assist all visitors and clients in a professional and courteous manner.
  • Oversee front desk operations, including answering and directing incoming calls and managing general enquiries.
  • Coordinate meeting room reservations and ensure all meeting spaces are clean, organised, and properly equipped.
  • Handle incoming mail and deliveries, including receiving, sorting, and distributing items promptly.
  • Handle the onboarding process for guests and new employees, such as issuing visitor passes and liaising with building security.
  • Monitor and manage office supply inventory, placing orders when required.
  • Serve as the main point of contact with building management and external vendors for office maintenance and facility matters.
  • Provide additional administrative support as needed to the Office Manager and Singapore leadership team.

The Successful Applicant

  • Has 5 years of reception or administrative experience within Financial Services industry.
  • Strong organisational and multitasking abilities.
  • Excellent business acumens and stakeholder management skills.
  • Exhibits excellent customer service, a proactive approach, and consistently positive demeanour.
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office and Concur systems.
  • The ability to maintain confidentiality and handle sensitive information.
  • Able to onboard on Jan 2026.

What's on Offer

This position provides a valuable platform to develop strong office operations experience while working closely with various teams and enhancing overall workplace efficiency.

Contact
